Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Min Shon's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $405 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-29-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
